data.body:
PASS 1 (T8 LLM/prompt structural-completeness overlay) — CLEAN, no findings.

Tool-verified every referenced surface/enum exists and is fully specified in source:
- Signing verdict vocabulary `certified|mismatch|foreign_key|unsigned` — defined in `src/rebar/signing.py:208-294` (verify_record docstring + branches). PASS (no undefined enum).
- `Runner` protocol + every `RunRequest` field (`mode` {findings|structured|text}, `execution_mode` {agentic|single_turn}, `output_schema`, `extra_tools`, `thinking`, `output_strategy`) — `src/rebar/llm/runner.py:28-84`. The two closed enums `EXECUTION_MODES` and `mode` are co-located with their consuming runner dispatch; their orthogonality is documented at `prompts.py:39-51`. PASS (no missing protocol/decision-rule co-location).
- Prompt/contract surface: `get_prompt`/`resolve_prompt`, closed `FRONT_MATTER_KEYS`, `.rebar/prompts/<id>.md` override resolution, derived index + CI drift gate — `src/rebar/llm/prompts.py`. PASS.
- Output-schema seam: `validate_structured` (`findings.py:247`), `response_model_for` (`contracts.py:33`), `register_contract` (`contracts.py:27`), `run_workflow`/`RunResult` (`workflow/executor.py:584/457`), `verify_completion` (`completion.py:169`). All exist. PASS (no pink-elephant / phantom-reference).

No proven structural gap (no undefined-but-referenced enum/protocol, no ambiguous counter, no unspecified sub-step fallback). The AC-mandated automated drift-check test (`tests/unit/test_reuse_surface_doc.py`) is the right verification seam and is appropriate for a doc-only deliverable.
